title: LCL
wikitext:
[]: LCL             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Sun Jul 16, 2006 3:31 am Well LCL is a very interesting liquid to me. You need that in the entry plug, and poeple go back to the form of LCL if their own AT Fields are broken. What actually is LCL? What is its chemical composition? How does it taste and smell?

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sun Jul 16, 2006 3:34 am Taste and scent are stated to be blood. That makes sense since Lilith bleeds LCL, and the LCL in entry plugs probably comes from the lake of LCL around her. Chemical composition is unknown-it seems to possess all the nutritinals of blood. It seems to become translucent when electrocuted, too. LCL has been stated to be Link Connection Liquid in, I think, the Red Cross Book. It doesn't seem to cover the humans melting into LCL, though...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jul 16, 2006 3:38 am See also: http://www.evacommentary.org/appendix/geektionary.html#lcl

[]:             Quote Post by Light of the Dawn » Sun Jul 16, 2006 3:41 am It has the taste and scent of blood, as Legend already said. I have no clue about chemicals... Sometimes I wonder what LCL really is.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sun Jul 16, 2006 4:04 am The Sea of LCL is called a Primordial Soup, and a PS said to have been a mixture of materials who became Amino Acids.

[]:             Quote Post by Light of the Dawn » Sun Jul 16, 2006 4:26 am Legend of the Past wrote: The Sea of LCL is called a Primordial Soup, and a PS said to have been a mixture of materials who became Amino Acids.

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Sun Jul 16, 2006 3:03 pm i thought the primordial soup was LCL and the stuff people are made of

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Jul 16, 2006 3:23 pm To be exact RCB wrote: The liquid that fills the inside of the entry plug. Viscous in nature and having a blood-like odor, when charged by electricity its molecular arrangement is altered, allowing L.C.L to perform a number of functions such as mentally linking the pilot and the Eva, supplying oxygen, and providing both physical and mental protection to the pilot. This same L.C.L also fills the lowest level of Terminal Dogma where Lilith is kept. Various interpretations have been circulated such as that "L.C.L" is the abbreviation of "Link Connected Liquid", but what it appears to be is the actual "soup of life".

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jul 16, 2006 3:41 pm LCL is..... PEOPLE!

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sun Jul 16, 2006 4:13 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: LCL is..... PEOPLE!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 16, 2006 10:00 pm Just FYI, bb's translation of Rei's line is incorrect. Rei actually says, "This is the Sea of LCL. Inside the sea where life began." (Lit. the sea of life's origins.) Hmm, I don't think that's quite the same thing as "the primordial soup of life"... (In #20, Misato actually does use the term "seimei no soup" to refer to what Shinji's turned into.) I hate it when bb does this.
summary:
[]: LCL             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Sun Jul 16, 2006 3:31 am Well LCL is a very interesting liquid to me. You need that in the entry plug, and poeple go back to the form of LCL if their own AT Fields are broken. What actually is LCL? What is its chemical composition? How does it taste and smell?

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sun Jul 16, 2006 3:34 am Tast
